nasb.text: The period which he reigned over Israel was forty years; he reigned in Hebron seven years and in Jerusalem thirty-three years.

esv.text: The time that he reigned over Israel was forty years. He reigned seven years in Hebron and thirty-three years in Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 大衛作王統治以色列的日子共四十年；他在希伯崙作王七年，在耶路撒冷作王三十三年。

ccb.text: 他在以色列执政共四十年：在希伯仑执政七年，在耶路撒冷执政三十三年。
